inputs.label: Total Time in Bed (minutes)
inputs.businessContext: Time from going to bed until final awakening.

businessContext_i18n.en: Time from going to bed until final awakening.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yatmadan son uyanışa kadar geçen süre.
businessContext_i18n.de: Zeit vom Zubettgehen bis zum endgültigen Aufwachen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Temps entre le coucher et le réveil final.

inputs.label: Sleep Latency (minutes)
inputs.businessContext: Time taken to fall asleep initially.

businessContext_i18n.en: Time taken to fall asleep initially.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Başlangıçta uykuya dalmak için geçen süre.
businessContext_i18n.de: Zeit, die zum anfänglichen Einschlafen benötigt wird.

inputs.label: Wake After Sleep Onset (minutes)
inputs.businessContext: Total time spent awake during the night after initially falling asleep.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total time spent awake during the night after initially falling asleep.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İlk uykuya daldıktan sonra gece boyunca uyanık geçen toplam süre.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzeit, die nach dem ersten Einschlafen während der Nacht wach verbracht wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Temps total passé éveillé pendant la nuit après s'être endormi initialement.

inputs.label: Number of Awakenings
inputs.businessContext: Count of distinct awakenings during the night.

businessContext_i18n.en: Count of distinct awakenings during the night.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der einzelnen Aufwachvorgänge während der Nacht.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de réveils distincts pendant la nuit.
